meta.name: Example cards
meta.description: This is an example file showing how the QASN Card format works.

card.title: This is a test card.
card.description: This is a description and it can continue like this in multiple lines, until it hit's another special character on the next line.

card.title: Nested cards
card.description: Nest cards have a space under the other card. Kinda like python.

card.title: Tags
card.description: At the end of a card you can put text to add a tag to that card. You can have multiple tags by appending another "tag" tag with spaces tag2

card.title: Check marks.
card.description: As you can see to create a card you put = but you can put an "v" after to mark it as checked.

card.title: Markdown
card.description: You can use **markdown** in descriptions if you put "*/" and then a new line. I don't like markdown though, but it supports it anyways!
